Game.Name: Pachi-Slot Monogatari - Universal Special (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Pachi-Slot Monogatari: Universal Special is a pachi-slots game for the Super Famicom, released in 1994. The game features two modes: the player can choose to practice on the six machines featured in the game; or they can play through the story mode, which involves travelling around the city and playing at various pachi-slot parlors to raise money.
Game.Notes: Pachi-Slot Monogatari: Universal Special is a pachi-slots game for the Super Famicom, released in 1994. The game features two modes: the player can choose to practice on the six machines featured in the game; or they can play through the story mode, which involves travelling around the city and playing at various pachi-slot parlors to raise money.
